---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a concrete improvement to the public ExoCortex core
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What friction or limitation are you trying to remove?

## Proposed change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why this belongs in the public core

Explain why this is reusable product logic rather than private-instance content.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or different designs did you consider?
